# Synthetic AWS access-key fixture for the secret-scan integration test.
#
# This value is NOT a real credential. It is shaped to match the upstream
# gitleaks `aws-access-token` rule so that the scanner reliably fires on
# it; that property is what `scripts/test-secret-scan.sh` exercises. See
# the sibling README.md for the full rationale.

aws_access_key_id=AKIAZ7XQ4F2KQM5R3PN6
